x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: UI Actions that modify incident forms or trigger workflows can conflict with Now Assist contextual actions. Customer UI actions need review to ensure they do not interfere with Now Assist agent assist panels.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: UI Actions on Incident and Task
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom UI actions on incident and task. Test with Now Assist agent assist panel enabled to identify conflicts with Now Assist contextual actions. Target: <25 custom active UI Actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: UI Actions on Incident and Task
